analysis.elliott_wave: Not applicable due to gold's non- Elliott Wave price action, focus on classical technical patterns and macro drivers.
analysis.momentum: Neutral momentum with RSI at 45.77, price action suggests a consolidation phase.
analysis.trade_plan: Buy on dips towards TV Pivot Support levels, target TV Pivot Resistance levels. Set stop-loss below TV Pivot Support. Monitor DXY and real yields for potential safe-haven demand shifts.
